title: Permafrost by LR
description: This texture pack brings a chill to your world—items and entities are frosted over with icy detail, and a freshly designed user interface immerses you in a sleek, frozen aesthetic.
body: This texture pack brings a chill to your world—items and entities are frosted over with icy detail, and a freshly designed user interface immerses you in a sleek, frozen aesthetic.
